## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Verification Level
<!-- Pick one and delete the others -->
- **P0 (must verify in real environment)**: Deployment config, entrypoint, API integration, new service
- **P1 (mock/unit tests sufficient)**: Pure logic, internal utilities, algorithms
- **P2 (no testing needed)**: Typo fix, comment update, doc-only change

## Verification Checklist

### For P0 changes (required):
- [ ] Tested in target environment (not just mock)
- [ ] Test output/screenshots attached below
- [ ] Target environment: <!-- e.g. AgentCore us-west-2, local Docker, etc. -->
- [ ] **Independently verified by another team member** (not the author)
- [ ] Independent verifier: <!-- @who -->

### For P1 changes:
- [ ] Unit/mock tests pass
- [ ] Test command: <!-- e.g. pytest tests/test_xxx.py -->

### For P2 changes:
- [ ] Visual review sufficient

## Test Evidence
<!-- For P0: paste actual command output, logs, or screenshots -->
```
# Paste real test output here
```
